name: wise-owl
description: Read-only multi-agent second-opinion review workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent second opinion for Codex plans, diffs, security, and tests.
interface.longDescription: Wise Owl packages three read-only critic agents and a Prime Owl judge into a reusable review workflow for high-risk Codex changes.
defaultPrompt: Use Wise Owl to review this plan before implementation.
Use Wise Owl to review the final diff and tests before finalizing.
